name: ASRock B650M-H/M.2+ Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x1 - M.2 Key E for WiFi - Support DDR5-6400+(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 1 Type-C+A - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Gigabit LAN
shortName: ASRock B650M-H/M.2+ Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 4.0
description: Micro-ATX motherboard for AM5 socket with PCIe 4.0 and DDR5 support for AMD Ryzen systems.
